opinion.h2: Nathan AMCHANITZKY, petitioner, v. The UNITED STATES.* No. 212.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Homer S. Cummings, Atty. Gen., for the United States.
For opinion below, see 81 Ct. Cl. 409.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the Court of Claims denied.
* Rehearing denied 296 U.S. 662, 56 S. Ct. 167.[ Amchanitzky v. U S 296 U.S. 598 (1935) ]
